channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: USD Rallies on Fed Rate-Hike Bets as US PCE Inflation Looms
item.description: New York is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the US session. US Dollar (USD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: NZD Sinks to 0.5650 on RBNZ Rate-Cut Bets & Oil Collapse
item.description: London is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the European session. New Zealand Dollar (NZD) faces the strongest bearish news pressure across the majors today. Here is what triggered the move and where it goes from here.
